final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: product photography, commercial shot
Primary request: professional product photography of a smartwatch on marble surface with coffee cup and notebook
Scene/backdrop: minimalist workspace desk, clean marble countertop texture
Subject: smartwatch with sleek metallic finish, digital display visible, positioned beside a ceramic coffee cup and leather-bound notebook
Style/medium: commercial product photography, minimalist business aesthetic
Composition/framing: medium close-up, slightly angled top-down view, shallow depth of field
Lighting/mood: soft natural side light from window, gentle shadows, clean and sophisticated mood
Color palette: neutral tones - white marble, warm brown leather, silver/space gray smartwatch, cream ceramic
Materials/textures: polished marble veining, brushed metal watch case, smooth ceramic glaze, grained leather cover
Constraints: smartwatch must be the focal point with clear product details visible, no distracting elements
Avoid: cluttered background, harsh artificial lighting, plastic-looking materials, oversaturated colors
